name: Esteban Valencia

hero.title: I build AI, data, and automation systems that turn messy inputs into tools people can actually use.
hero.body: This profile is where I share what I'm building, the open-source work behind it, the private systems I can talk about, and the AI signals I keep an eye on.

now: Building retrieval, validation, and scoring systems across AI and data workflows.
Shipping repo-native tools that bring geospatial, finance, and ML work into the same decision flow.

activeBuilds.name: niche-radar
activeBuilds.summary: A niche finder that pulls from external sources and turns noisy market inputs into signals you can use.

activeBuilds.name: ingo
activeBuilds.summary: A shell-first RAG CLI for PDFs, OCR, embeddings, and vector search without a heavy app runtime.

activeBuilds.name: li-jobs
activeBuilds.summary: A jobs collection API for scraping, normalization, and downstream job-data workflows.

openSourceTools.name: open_ksa
openSourceTools.summary: A Python utility for working with Saudi Arabia's open data platform across thousands of datasets.

openSourceTools.name: tidyup
openSourceTools.summary: A CLI utility for sorting files and folders by extension and date.

openSourceTools.name: translagent
openSourceTools.summary: A translation app with transliteration and audio support, built end to end.

privateSystems.name: Purchase-Likelihood Scoring Pipeline
privateSystems.summary: A propensity scoring system for campaign targeting that improved margin in retail marketing workflows.

privateSystems.name: Geodatabase Validation Toolkit
privateSystems.summary: Private Python tooling for validating ESRI geodatabases and companion Excel deliverables against configurable rules.

privateSystems.name: ATS Scanner
privateSystems.summary: A deterministic resume parsing and job-fit scoring service with explicit evaluation rules and clear failure handling.

workWithMe.title: Work With Me
workWithMe.body: If you need someone who can connect model behavior, data systems, APIs, and the automation around them, start with [the broader portfolio](https://works.estebanvalencia.com) or reach out on [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/valest).
